NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPELANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, AND DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION FILED BY DEFENDANT QUINONEZ, HENRY HEARING SET FOR MAY-22-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT HENRY QUINONEZ'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, AND DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION IS GRANTED, WITH MONETARY SANCTIONS AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER LANKSTON IN THE AMOUNT OF $160. THE MOTION IS GRANTED ON THE GROUNDS SET FORTH IN THE MOVING PAPERS, AND: (1) THE MOTION IS NOT OPPOSED; (2) PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SUBMITTED ANY RESPONSE OR PROPOSED RESPONSE TO THE FORM INTERROGATORIES OR DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION. (MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER.) PRO TEM JUDGE: KATHERINE HUIBONHOA; NOT REPORTED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LANKSTON, ALEXANDER J. SERVED AUG-31-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT QUINONEZ, HENRY G.

calendar.matters:
ARBITRATOR JURISDICTION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar May-31-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compelanswers To Form Interrogatories, And Demand For Production
Off Calendar May-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT HENRY QUINONEZ's Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories, And Demand For Production is Granted, with monetary sanctions awarded against plaintiff Alexander Lankston in the amount of $160. The Motion is granted on the grounds set forth in the moving papers, and: (1) the Motion is not opposed; (2) plaintiff has not submitted any response or proposed response to the Form Interrogatories or Demand for Production. (Moving party to submit a proposed order.) Pro Tem Judge: Katherine Huibonhoa; Not reported
